projects.name: Lyra Shell
projects.short_desc: Lyra is a hyper-customizable plugin-driven linux shell, it's behavior is modular instead of hardcoded.
projects.desc: Minimalist interactive shell for Linux, written in C and Rust with embedded Lua scripting. Designed for runtime configurability, lyra enables users to redefine core shell behaviors, including prompts, parsing, and command execution, through Lua scripts.

projects.name: LyTop
projects.short_desc: Extensible system monitor built for Linux terminals. Designed for high customizability via Lua scripting, LyTop combines a C++ core with a fully scriptable Lua-based widget/UI system.

projects.name: Yet Another Interface Design Language
projects.desc: YAIDL is a Rust workspace that compiles a compact HTTP DSL describing structs, unions, and endpoints into ready-to-wire code
